fields.title: Production Planning Specialist / Executive
fields.description: At ?lker - part of pladis Global, we all know what it means to ?bring it?. Whether it?s our passion, team spirit or go-getting attitude. Our courage. Our ownership. Our whole selves. Our care and compassion. We bring it. Day in, day out. ?lker stands as a leading food company in T?rkiye and its region, supported by its successful international operations. Our 16,000 colleagues ? across our global network of bakeries, distribution sites and offices ? each with their own unique, diverse experience of happiness, come together with one shared purpose: to bring happiness with every bite, we say: ?Winning feels good, winning together feels better!? pladis is looking for Production Planning Specialist/Executive for our Supply Chain Department for pladis TURCA ?lker Bisk?vi Ankara Factory. Key Deliverables Create production plans aligned with production capacity and customer demand Monitor daily/weekly/monthly production plans Analyze stock levels and perform material requirements planning (MRP) Collaborate with production, purchasing, warehouse, and quality teams Manage and improve lead times Track and report production performance indicators (KPIs) Maintain planning records in SAP/ERP systems Analyze scrap, efficiency, and capacity utilization rates What Do You Need for This Role? Bachelor?s degree in Industrial Engineering, Business Administration, Logistics, or related engineering fields Minimum 4 years of experience in production planning, material requirements planning (MRP), or inventory management Proficiency in ERP systems (especially SAP) Strong analytical and problem-solving skills Advanced proficiency in MS Office applications Strong communication skills and a team-oriented mindset Preferably experience in a manufacturing environment Discipline in planning and reporting processes Our values We bring happiness with every bite. It?s a purpose that every one of our colleagues, all around the world believes in. And while we?re all unique, we share the same values. These define who we are, how we interact, and get things done. How we deliver our purpose and keep bringing happiness to the world. Purpose-led ? because we?re energized and guided by our promise to bring happiness with every bite. Agile ? because we?re ever evolving, we never stand still, always improving for our customers and consumers. Collaborative ? because we gain strength from operating as one pladis, winning and succeeding together. Resilient ? because we?re persistent in the face of setbacks, quick to adapt, learn, and move forward. Positive ? because we?re highly motivated, optimistic, courageous, and we inspire each other to be better. Inclusion, diversity, and equity are an important part of who we are and what we stand for as an employer. They are central to everything we do and are reflected across our business. pladis brings together brands and people from around the globe ? and this diversity is our great strength. Because we want everyone to bring their true, whole self to pladis. We value colleagues for their uniqueness ? we all have a voice that?s heard and respected. We?re an equal opportunity employer and believe in encouraging an inclusive environment where we celebrate the diversity of thinking and respect everyone?s distinctive qualities and perspectives. Y?ld?z Holding ?irketleri ?al??an Aday? Ayd?nlatma Metni i?in t?klay?n?z. Show more Show less
